# Auto-generated from triggers.log @ 2026-05-09T07:54:17+00:00. Do not hand-edit. Run POST /reload after the engine regenerates the source.

## active_lens
Scopes: none

Checks if the specified lens is open  
active_lens = lens

## active_lens_option
Scopes: none

Checks if the specified lens option is activated  
active_lens_option = lens_option_key

## add_to_temporary_list
Scopes: none

Saves a temporary target for use during the trigger execution  
This is used to build lists in triggers.  
If used within an any-trigger, placement within the trigger is quite important. The game will iterate through every instance of the any-trigger until it finds a single instance that fulfills the requirements, and then it will stop.  
In order to add every instance of a scope that fulfills certain conditions, use "count = all" while also placing this "effect" at the very end of the any-trigger (so that every condition is evaluated for every iteration).

## additional_war_exhaustion
Scopes: country

Compares the additional war exhaustion the scoped country has accumulated from scripted events in the target diplomatic play  
additional_war_exhaustion = { target = scope:war.diplomatic_play value > 1.0 }
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## age
Scopes: character

Compares the character age  
age > 20
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## aggressive_diplomatic_plays_permitted
Scopes: country

True if country is independent or permitted to start their own Diplomatic Plays  
aggressive_diplomatic_plays_permitted = bool
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## ai_ship_value
Scopes: ship

AI valuation of a ship in £, equal to the current template-version construction cost times NAI::SHIP_TRANSFER_BASE_VALUE_PER_CONSTRUCTION_POINT  
ai_ship_value >= 5000
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## all_false
Scopes: none

true if all children are false (equivalent to NOR)

## always
Scopes: none

checks if the assigned yes/no value is true  
always = yes # always succeeds  
always = no  # always fails  
always = scope:a_boolean_value # evaluated at runtime  
Traits: yes/no

## amendment_can_be_repealed
Scopes: amendment

Check if the amendment can be repealed  
amendment_can_be_repealed = yes/no
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## amendment_count
Scopes: law

Compares the number of amendments in scope law  
amendment_count >= 2
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## amendment_stance
Scopes: character, interest_group, political_movement

Compares the stance of the scoped character, movement or interest group has on the specified amendment type, assuming the amendment type has a parent law  
amendment_stance = {  
	amendment = <scope>  
	value = <stance>  
}
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## and
Scopes: none

all inside trigger must be true

## any_active_law
Scopes: country
Targets: law

Iterate through all active laws in a country  
any_active_law = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

any_active_party = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

## any_combat_unit
Scopes: battle, building, front, hq, military_formation
Targets: new_combat_unit

Iterate through all combat units of input scope  
Supported scopes: building, military formation, front, battle  
any_combat_unit = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

Scopes: none
Targets: country

ship_mod_coastal_defence_doctrine = {  
	value = 1  
	if = {  
		limit = { has_strategy = ai_strategy_armed_isolationism }  
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost  
	}  
}

## any_country_in_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: country

jail_ten_year_value = {  
	if = {  
		limit = {  
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope  
		}  
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity  
		divide = 5  
		max = 25  
	}  
}

Scopes: none
Targets: country

neg_option_9_modifier = {  
	if = {  
		limit = {  
			scope:ig = {  
				OR = {  
					is_interest_group_type = ig_devout  
					is_interest_group_type = ig_trade_unions  
				}  
			}  
		}  
		add = 30  
	}  
}

## any_country_strategic_region
Scopes: country
Targets: strategic_region

Iterate through all strategic regions containing states owned by the scoped country  
any_country_strategic_region = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

any_decentralized_country = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

## any_false
Scopes: none

true if any child is false (equivalent to NAND)

## any_harvest_condition
Scopes: country, state, state_region, strategic_region
Targets: harvest_condition

Iterate through all harvest conditions affecting a state, state region, strategic region, or country  
any_harvest_condition = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_in_global_list
Scopes: none

Iterate through all items in global list. list = name or variable = name  
any_in_global_list = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

Targets: country

any_in_hierarchy = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

any_in_list = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

any_in_local_list = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

	}

		limit = {

		}  
		divide = army_power_projection  
	}  
}

Scopes: none
Targets: province

jail_five_year_value = {  
	if = {  
		limit = {  
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope  
		}  
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity  
		divide = 10  
		max = 15  
	}  
}

## any_province_in_scandinavia
Scopes: none
Targets: province

gfx_infantry_mobilization_count = {  
	value = 0  
	market = {  
		mg:small_arms = {  
			add = market_goods_sell_orders  
		}  
	}  
	divide = 1000  
	add = 1  
	max = 3  
}

## any_province_in_senegal_old
Scopes: none
Targets: province

money_amount_multiplier_very_large = {  
	value = root.gdp  
	divide = 1000000  
	multiply = 2.5  
	round = yes  
	multiply = 1000  
	min = 100  
}

## any_province_in_siberia
Scopes: none
Targets: province

max_canton_system_level = {  
	value = state.modifier:state_trade_center_max_limit_add  
	subtract = scope:num_levels  
}

## any_province_in_south_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: province

jail_three_year_value = {  
	if = {  
		limit = {  
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope  
		}  
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity  
		divide = 20  
		max = 10  
	}  
}

## any_province_in_south_america
Scopes: none
Targets: province

state_urbanization_rate = {  
    value = total_urbanization  
    divide = state_population  
    multiply = 1000  
    min = 0  
    max = 1  
}

## any_province_in_south_china
Scopes: none
Targets: province

ship_mod_jeune_ecole_doctrine = {  
	value = 1  
	if = {  
		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_jeune_ecole }  
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost  
	}  
}

## any_rival_country
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country that is being rivaled by the country in a scope  
any_rival_country = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_rivaling_country
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country that is rivaling the country in a scope  
any_rivaling_country = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_admiral
Scopes: country, front, interest_group, military_formation
Targets: character

Iterate through all admirals in a: country, interestgroup, or military formation  
any_scope_admiral = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_ally
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Iterate through all allies to a: country  
any_scope_ally = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_amendment
Scopes: law
Targets: amendment

Iterate through amendments of the scoped law  
any_scope_amendment = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_army
Scopes: country, front, hq
Targets: military_formation

Iterate through all armies currently present at input scope  
Supported scopes: country, front, hq  
any_scope_army = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_article
Scopes: treaty
Targets: treaty_article

Iterate through articles of the scoped treaty  
any_scope_article = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_article_option
Scopes: treaty_options, treaty
Targets: treaty_article_options

Iterate through article_options of the scoped treaty or treaty_options  
any_scope_article_option = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_building
Scopes: country, state
Targets: building

Iterate through all buildings in a: state, country  
any_scope_building = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_character
Scopes: country, front, interest_group, military_formation
Targets: character

Iterate through all characters in a: country, interestgroup, or front  
any_scope_character = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_country
Scopes: market, state_region, strategic_region
Targets: country

Iterate through all countries with a presence in the supported scope (currently: market, strategic region)  
any_scope_country = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_culture
Scopes: country, state
Targets: culture

Iterate through all cultures in the scope  
any_scope_culture = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

Scopes: country, culture
Targets: state

any_scope_homeland_state = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

any_scope_interest_marker = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

Scopes: country, military_formation
Targets: ship

Iterate through all ships in a country or military formation  
any_scope_ship = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_state
Scopes: country, front, state_region, strait, strategic_region, theater
Targets: state

Iterate through all states including provinces from a: country, state_region, theater, front, or strait  
any_scope_state = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_strait
Scopes: country, state
Targets: strait

Iterate through all straits with a land endpoint in the scoped state or country  
any_scope_strait = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

Scopes: diplomatic_play
Targets: country

Iterate through all allies to a target in a: diplomatic play  
any_scope_target_ally = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

Scopes: country
Targets: theater

Iterate through all theaters in a: country  
any_scope_theater = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_treaty
Scopes: country
Targets: treaty

Iterate through in force treaties binding the scoped country  
any_scope_treaty = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_violate_sovereignty_interested_parties
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Iterate through all countries that would be interested if country in scope has their sovereignty violated  
any_scope_violate_sovereignty_interested_parties = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars
Scopes: country
Targets: war

Iterate through all relevant wars if target country had their sovereignty violated by scoped country  
any_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

Scopes: country
Targets: war

Iterate through all wars related to the scope  
any_scope_war = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_sea_node_adjacent_state

Targets: state

Iterate through all states that share a sea node with a state  
any_sea_node_adjacent_state = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

## any_state
Scopes: none
Targets: state

Iterate through all states globally  
any_state = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

## any_state_in_afghanistan
Scopes: none
Targets: state

building_groups_extra = {  
	add = building_group_levels_to_increase_value  
	subtract = building_group_levels_existing  
}

## any_state_in_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: state

provinces_with_forested_terrain = {  
	every_province = {  
		if = {  
			limit = { has_label = label_forested }  
			add = 1  
		}  
	}  
}

## any_state_in_alpide_belt
Scopes: none
Targets: state

concentration_of_defensive_mobilized_battalions = {  
	add = num_mobilized_units_in_theater  
	divide = num_provinces_in_theater  
}

## any_state_in_amazon
Scopes: none
Targets: state

max_canton_system_level = {  
	value = state.modifier:state_trade_center_max_limit_add  
	subtract = scope:num_levels  
}

## any_state_in_americas
Scopes: none
Targets: state

building_levels_extra = {#uses IG scope  
	add = building_levels_to_increase_value  
	subtract = building_levels_existing  
}

## any_state_in_central_america

		}  
	}

Targets: state

	if = {  
		limit = {  
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope  
		}  
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity  
		divide = 10  
		max = 15  
	}  
}

## any_state_in_great_rift_valley
Scopes: none
Targets: state

army_projection_comparison = {  
	add = overlord.army_power_projection  
	if = {  
		limit = {  
			army_power_projection > 0  
		}  
		divide = army_power_projection  
	}  
}

	subtract = building_group_levels_existing  
}

	divide = 50  
	add = 1  
	max = 10  
}

		}  
	}  
}

		max = 25  
	}

## any_state_region
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

Iterate through all state regions  
any_state_region = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

## any_state_region_in_afghanistan
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

money_amount_multiplier_medium = {  
	value = root.gdp  
	divide = 100000  
	multiply = 0.25  
	round = yes  
	multiply = 100  
	min = 100  
}

	divide = 1000000  
	multiply = 2.5  
	round = yes  
	multiply = 1000  
	min = 100  
}

Targets: state_region

	add = overlord.army_power_projection  
	if = {  
		limit = {  
			army_power_projection > 0  
		}  
		divide = army_power_projection  
	}  
}

Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

army_projection_comparison = {  
	add = overlord.army_power_projection  
	if = {  
		limit = {  
			army_power_projection > 0  
		}  
		divide = army_power_projection  
	}  
}

## any_strategic_objective
Scopes: country
Targets: state

Iterate through all Strategic Objective states from the scoped Country  
any_strategic_objective = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_strategic_region
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

Iterate through all strategic regions globally  
any_strategic_region = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

## any_strategic_region_in_afghanistan
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

	if = {  
		limit = {  
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope  
		}  
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity  
		divide = 10  
		max = 15  
	}

## any_strategic_region_in_central_america_old
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

power_bloc_cohesion_script = {  
	if = {  
		limit = {  
			exists = ROOT.power_bloc  
		}  
		value = ROOT.power_bloc.current_cohesion_number  
	}  
	else = {  
		value = 0  
	}  
}

## any_strategic_region_in_colonial_new_grenada
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

free_cotton_producing_arable_land = {  
	value = 0  
	every_scope_state = {  
		limit = {  
			can_construct_building = building_cotton_plantation  
		}  
		add = this.free_arable_land  
	}  
}

			exists = scope:prisoner_scope

		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity  
		divide = 20  
		max = 10  
	}  
}

## any_strategic_region_in_german_confederation
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

free_cotton_producing_arable_land = {  
	value = 0  
	every_scope_state = {  
		limit = {  
			can_construct_building = building_cotton_plantation  
		}  
		add = this.free_arable_land  
	}  
}

	multiply = 0.075  
	round = yes  
	multiply = 10  
	min = 100  
}

## any_subject_of_subject
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country below direct subjects in hierarchy  
any_subject_of_subject = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_subject_or_below
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country below current in hierarchy  
any_subject_or_below = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_supporting_character
Scopes: political_movement
Targets: character

Iterate through all characters that support the scoped political movement  
any_supporting_character = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

## any_treaty
Scopes: none
Targets: treaty

Iterate through treaties (both in force and drafts)  
any_treaty = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }

## any_valid_mass_migration_culture

Lists for cultures in the scoped country that are valid for mass migration  
any_valid_mass_migration_culture = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

Targets: country

any_war_participant = { <count=num/all> / <percent=fixed_point> <triggers> }
Reads nothing for all scopes.

Reads gamestate for all scopes.

Check arable land in state  
arable_land > 10
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

arable_land_country > 10
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

Compare a ship's armor  
armor >= 10
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## army_mobilization_option_fraction
Scopes: country

Checks that a countries army has a certain percentage of units with a specific monbilization option  
scope:country = {  
  army_mobilization_option_fraction = {  
    target = mobilization_option:key  
    value >= 0.2  
  }  
}
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## army_power_projection

Compare to a country's total army power projection  
 scope:example_country = { army_power_projection < root.army_power_projection
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## assert_if
Scopes: none

Conditionally cause an assert during run time  
assert_if = { limit = { X } text = Y }, where X is a trigger and Y is an optional string

## assert_read
Scopes: none

Conditionally cause an assert during read time  
assert_read = X, where X is yes or the string to be printed in the assert

Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

available_jobs > 10000

Reads gamestate for all scopes.

average_sol_for_culture = { target = cu:polish value > 10 }

## binds
Scopes: treaty_options, treaty
Targets: country

scope:some_treaty = {  
	if = { limit = {  
		binds = c:FRA  
		binds = c:BEL  
	}}  
}
Traits: country scope
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## calc_true_if
Scopes: none

Returns true if the specified number of sub-triggers return true  
calc_true_if = { amount = 2 <trigger> <trigger> <trigger> }

Checks if the building of a particular type in scoped state is able to active the specified production method  
can_activate_production_method = { building_type = <key> production_method = <key> }
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## can_afford_diplomatic_action

Checks if the country in scope can afford the Influence for the specified diplomatic action (pact or ongoing)  
can_afford_diplomatic_action = { target = X type = Y }  
Where X = country and Y = diplomatic action type
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

can_agitate = <scope/c:TAG>
Traits: country scope
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## can_be_enacted
Scopes: law

Checks if a law could be enacted by its country, considering its current situation  
can_be_enacted = yes
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## can_break_diplomatic_pact
Scopes: country

Checks if there is a diplomatic pact of the specified type with target country that can be broken by scope country  
can_break_diplomatic_pact = { target = <country scope> type = <action type key> first_state = <state scope, optional> second_state = <state scope, optional>  
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## can_construct_building
Scopes: state

Checks if 1 level of <building_type> can be constructed in a scoped state  
can_construct_building = <building_type>
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## can_create_diplomatic_pact
Scopes: country

Checks if a diplomatic pact is valid to create with another country  
can_create_diplomatic_pact = { target = <country scope> type = <action type key> first_state = <state scope, optional> second_state = <state scope, optional>  
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## can_create_treaty
Scopes: none

Checks if a treaty between countries can be created  
can_create_treaty = {  
	first_country = <country>			# (default: none) must _not_ be specified if the created treaty is an amendment  
	second_country = <country>			# (default: none) must _not_ be specified if the created treaty is an amendment  
	amends = <treaty>					# (default: none) if specified, the created treaty will be an amendment to the specified treaty  
  
	is_draft = yes | no					# (default: yes) must be yes if this treaty is an amendement to an existing treaty  
	entered_into_force_on = <date>		# (default: none) means "today" if not specified (for non-drafts). Must _not_ be specified for drafts. Cannot be in the future  
	binding_period = {					# (default: 0) must be a nonnegative number, fractional parts will be ignored (truncation)  
		days = <nonnegative number>  
		| weeks = <nonnegative number>  
		| months = <nonnegative number>  
		| years = <nonnegative number>  
	}  
  
	articles_to_create = {				# (default: empty) non-amendments must have at least one article to create  
		{  
			article = <key>				# (default: empty) the type of article (determined by script)  
			source_country = <country>	# (default: none) directed articles _must_ specify this value, mutual articles _must not_ specify this value  
			target_country = <country>	# (default: none) directed articles _must_ specify this value, mutual articles _must not_ specify this value  
  
			inputs = {					# (default: empty) list of inputs values as required by the article  
				{  
					quantity = <positive number>  
					| good = <good>  
					| state = <state>  
					| strategic_region = <strategic region>  
					| company = <company> # TODO: or company type?  
					| building = <building> # TODO: or building type?  
					| law = <law> # TODO: or law type?  
					| country = <country>  
				}  
  
				{ ... }					# one input per required input of the corresponding article type  
			}  
		}  
  
		# some examples of valid articles  
		{ article = alliance }			# mutual, no inputs  
		{  
			article = resource_transfer # directed  
			source_country = c:FRA		# because directed  
			target_country = c:GBR 		# because directed  
  
			inputs = {  
				{ quantity = 250 }		# because resource_transfer has required_inputs = { quantity good }  
				{ good = g:coal }		# because resource_transfer has required_inputs = { quantity good }  
			}  
		}  
	}  
}

## can_decrease_autonomy
Scopes: country

Check if a subject country is able to become a less autonomous subject type  
can_increase_autonomy = yes
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## can_trigger_event
Scopes: country

Check if country can trigger the specified event  
can_trigger_event = key
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## cash_reserves_available
Scopes: building

Evaluates a production building's available cash reserves  
cash_reserves_available > 25000
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## cash_reserves_ratio
Scopes: building

Evaluates a production building's available cash reserve ratio compared to its maximum  
Returns 1 if the building has no maximum cash reserves  
cash_reserves_ratio > 0.2
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## custom_description
Scopes: none

Wraps triggers that get a custom description instead of the auto-generated one  
custom_description = {  
	text = <trigger_localization_key>  
	subject = <optional subject scope> #defaults to current scope  
	object = <optional object scope>  
	value = <optional script value>  
	... triggers ...  
}

## custom_tooltip
Scopes: none

Replaces the tooltips for the enclosed triggers with a custom text  
custom_tooltip = {  
	text = <text>  
	subject = <scope> (optional)  
	<trigger>  
}

## has_employee_slots_filled
Scopes: building

has_employee_slots_filled = { pop_type = X percent = Y }  
Where X is a pop type and Y is a fixed point
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## has_truce_with
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Check if a country has a truce with a different target country  
has_truce_with = c:GBR
Traits: country scope
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## has_type
Scopes: treaty_article, treaty_article_options

Checks if the scoped object has the type identified by the given string  
scope:some_object = {  
	has_type = defensive_pact  
}
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## hidden_trigger
Scopes: none

hidden_trigger = { <more triggers> }

## highest_overlapping_interest_tier
Scopes: country

Compares the highest interest tier rank (scope country) among strategic regions where both countries have an interest.  
Usage:  
country_scope = {  
	highest_overlapping_interest_tier = { target = c:GBR value >= 2 }  
}  
Returns -1 if there are no overlapping interests.
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## highest_secession_progress
Scopes: country

Compares the highest secession progress of any secession movement in a given country  
highest_secession_progress > 0.7
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## is_immune_to_revolutions
Scopes: country

Checks if the country has been set to be immune to revolutions via set_immune_to_revolutions  
Warning: This does not check if the country is naturally immune to revolutions due to for example being a revolutionary country itself, only for the effects of set_immune_to_revolutions.  
is_immune_to_revolutions = yes/no
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## is_in_government
Scopes: interest_group

True if IG scope is in the government  
is_in_government = bool
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## is_in_list
Scopes: none

Checks if a target in in a list

## is_mass_migration_target
Scopes: state

Mass migration target is state.  
any_state = { limit = { owner = ROOT is_mass_migration_target = yes } }
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## is_panel_open
Scopes: none

Checks if a certain infopanel is open, specified as an event target (target) or as a string (panel_name). Specify an optional named tab (tab_name) to check if this tab is open.  
is_panel_open = { target = <scope> OR panel_name = panel_name tab_name = tab_name }

## is_party
Scopes: party
Targets: party

Checks if the target party is same as scoped party. Will only work on exact same party object, meaning you can't compare across countries.  
is_party = <party>
Traits: party scope
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## is_renegotiation
Scopes: treaty_options, treaty

Checks if the scoped treaty is amending an existing treaty  
scope:some_treaty = {  
	if = { limit = {  
		is_renegotiation = yes  
	}}  
}
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## journal_entry_age
Scopes: journal_entry

Return the age of the journal entry (since activation) in days  
journal_entry_age > 720
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## law_approved_by

Checks whether the scoped law is approved by an interest group  
law_approved_by = ig_rural_folk
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## law_enactment_stance
Scopes: character, interest_group, political_movement

Compares the stance of the scoped character, movement or interest group has about enactment of the specified law compared to the current active law in the same group
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## law_is_available
Scopes: law

Checks if a law is available for its country, considering its current situation. Like can_be_enacted, but ignores government support  
law_is_available = yes
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## law_progressiveness_difference
Scopes: law_type

Compares the progressiveness of the scoped law type to the target law type, higher value means greater difference  
"law_progressiveness_difference( scope:target_law )" > 50
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## law_stance
Scopes: character, interest_group, political_movement

Compares the base stance of the scoped character, movement or interest group has about the specified law, ignoring the current active law in the same group
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## leading_producer_of
Scopes: country
Targets: goods

Checks if country is producing the most of a certain good  
leading_producer_of = g:luxury_clothes
Traits: goods scope
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

Scopes: country

Check if any other country is part of this country's customs union  
leads_customs_union = bool
Traits: yes/no 
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## levels_owned_by_country
Scopes: building

Compares how many levels a country or investors in that country own in a building  
 levels_owned_by_country = {  
 target = c:GBR  
 value  >= 1
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## leverage_advantage
Scopes: power_bloc

Checks that the leverage advantage between power bloc and target country meets condition  
power_bloc =  
{  
		leverage = { target = c:BEL value > 0 }  
}
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## liberty_desire
Scopes: country

Compare trigger for the Liberty Desire value in a scoped country.  
liberty_desire > 50
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## liberty_desire_weekly_progress
Scopes: country

Compare trigger for the weekly Liberty Desire progress value in a scoped country.  
liberty_desire_weekly_progress > 0
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## liberty_desire_weekly_progress_from_support_independence

Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=

Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## potential_diplomatic_play_power_ratio
Scopes: country

Check the expected power ratio between scope country side and target country side in a potential diplomatic play  
Attempts to predict which sides involved participants will take (if any) so doesn't just check 'starting strengths'  
potential_diplomatic_play_power_ratio = { type = dp_open_market target = c:BEL state = c:BEL.capital value > 1.0 }  
state and type are optional, will default to dp_open_market on target capital
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## power_bloc_share_gdp
Scopes: country

Compare the share of GDP of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc current members, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc  
power_bloc_share_gdp > 0.2
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## power_bloc_share_gdp_with
Scopes: country

Compare the share of GDP of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members plus an additional country, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc  
"power_bloc_share_gdp_with(scope:country) > 0.2"
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## power_bloc_share_gdp_without
Scopes: country

Compare the share of GDP of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members minus one of the members, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc  
"power_bloc_share_gdp_without(scope:country) > 0.2"
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare how many members are among the leading producers for all goods worldwide weighted by their position in the ranking.The top producer is weighted by MIN_SPOT_PRESTIGE_AWARD and then each subsequent position is weighted by one less until.By default this means 1st counts as 3, 2nd as 2 and 3rd as 1. Any other positions as 0.  
power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers > 15
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers_with
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare how many members are among the leading producers for all goods worldwide weighted by their position in the ranking, plus one additional country not currently in the power bloc.The top producer is weighted by MIN_SPOT_PRESTIGE_AWARD and then each subsequent position is weighted by one less until.By default this means 1st counts as 3, 2nd as 2 and 3rd as 1. Any other positions as 0.  
"power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers_with(scope:target) > 15"
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

## power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers_without
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare how many members are among the leading producers for all goods worldwide weighted by their position in the ranking, minus one country that is currently in the power bloc.The top producer is weighted by MIN_SPOT_PRESTIGE_AWARD and then each subsequent position is weighted by one less until.By default this means 1st counts as 3, 2nd as 2 and 3rd as 1. Any other positions as 0.  
"power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers_without(scope:target) > 15"
Traits: <, <=, =, !=, >, >=
Reads gamestate for all scopes.

power_bloc_worst_economic_dependence > 2.2

Reads gamestate for all scopes.

switch = {  
	trigger = simple_assign_trigger  
	case_1 = { <triggers> }  
	case_2 = { <triggers> }  
	case_n = { <triggers> }  
	fallback = { <triggers> }

## trigger_else
Scopes: none

Evaluates the triggers if the display_triggers of preceding 'trigger_if' or 'trigger_else_if' is not mettrigger_if = { limit = { <display_triggers> } <triggers> }  
 trigger_else = { <triggers> }

## trigger_else_if
Scopes: none

Evaluates the enclosed triggers if the display_triggers of the preceding `trigger_if` or `trigger_else_if` is not met and its own display_trigger of the limit is mettrigger_if = { limit = { <display_triggers> } <triggers> }  
trigger_else_if = { limit = { <display_triggers> } <triggers> }

## trigger_if
Scopes: none

Evaluates the triggers if the display_triggers of the limit are met  
trigger_if = { limit = { <display_triggers> } <triggers> }
